query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.phone, u.openId, c.id as customerId, c.name as customerName, c.accountBalance FROM users u LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.userId = u.id WHERE u.phone = '15921456877' OR u.name = 'test' OR u.phone = 'test';
